title: Fix frontend owner privilege checks and UI rendering

requirements.summary: Update frontend owner-check logic to use hardcoded principal comparison in Settings and Dashboard pages
acceptanceCriteria: When logged in as q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe, the Settings screen renders all owner-only sections (labor rates, Stripe key, maintenance packages, role management).
When logged in as any other principal, the Settings screen either shows a restricted message or redirects.
The Dashboard owner-only metrics card and Labor Rates card render for the owner principal.
No page shows 'Metrics restricted' when the owner is logged in (as visible in the uploaded screenshots).

file_operations.description: Update the owner-check logic to compare the authenticated Internet Identity principal directly against the hardcoded string 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'. Replace any backend-only role query dependency with a local principal comparison. Ensure all owner-only sections (labor rates management, Stripe configuration, role management UI) render fully when this principal is authenticated. Add a fallback to show a restricted message or redirect for non-owner principals.

Update the owner-check logic to compare the authenticated Internet Identity principal directly against the hardcoded string 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'. Remove or supplement any backend role query that might return stale results. Ensure the owner-only metrics card and Labor Rates card render correctly when this principal is authenticated, eliminating the 'Metrics restricted' message shown in the uploaded screenshots.

Update the isOwner utility function to perform a direct principal string comparison against 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe' using the current Internet Identity principal. Ensure this check is synchronous and does not rely solely on backend role queries that could be stale or missing after canister upgrades. Export this updated utility for use in SettingsPage and DashboardPage.
